autonomy_budget.summary: Recorded the remote-autonomy testing direction without exceeding the bounded planning budget.

delta_summary: ADF now records a bounded remote-autonomy testing workflow and points its next autonomy-facing move at a real current-task continuity evaluation on adf-dev.
handoff_summary: ADF now has a pack-local remote-autonomy testing workflow for adf-dev.
The next autonomy-facing move is evaluate_adf_dev_remote_autonomy_continuity through the official PackFactory remote path.
The first recommended real-task candidate for that evaluation is deepen_dependency_aware_playbooks.
The purpose of the next run is to judge checkpoint quality, restart continuity, and usefulness of the returned evidence, not just whether the remote shell stayed busy.
highest_risk_observation: Highest risk: it is still easy to mistake remote shell activity for real autonomy progress, so the next run must be judged by checkpoint and restart quality instead of by output volume.

memory_tier.summary: Pack-local restart memory for the new adf-dev remote-autonomy testing direction.

memory_validity.summary: Low-confidence active pack restart memory with 12h freshness window.

summary_lines: Do not replace the PackFactory remote control plane with manual shell babysitting on adf-dev.
Do not treat a noisy remote session as proof of autonomy if checkpoint, memory, and restart surfaces are weak.

recommended_next_action: Recommended next action: run one bounded PackFactory-managed remote autonomy slice on adf-dev against a real current ADF task and judge the checkpoint quality before scaling unattended execution further.
summary: This restart memory captures the new adf-dev remote-autonomy testing direction for ADF.
